contract.description: 27 coordinates at seven unique g=2..16 log-spaced rows plus the across-depth mean

depth_matched_gate.guardrail: this g=2..16, 216-D refit is used by external panels but is not the frozen full-depth 243-D gate; no brook-trout row has an independent gate truth
depth_matched_gate.training_target: canonical A/B/C rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak A/B/C plus D

descriptive_panel_accounting.guardrail: 11 is not 11 independent validation units and is not an accuracy denominator; subsamples, no-record panels, and strict-locus reruns are correlated views

analysis.guardrail: candidate-direction concordance is not accuracy: published labels reuse the scored microsatellites, stocking records do not prove realized introgression, and topology and continuous-migration assumptions are unresolved

adjudication.decision_basis: same-locus literature comparator, unresolved three-population topology, and continuous-migration target mismatch prevent acceptance regardless of OOD score
adjudication.severe_OOD_threshold: max(raw_all direction RMS-z, depth-matched gate RMS-z) > 10

records.candidate_direction_evidence: source-internal conflict: Table 1 marks stocking at the sample location and within 2 km, but the Discussion says every site with more than 10% assigned introgression was not directly stocked; P3->P2 direction evidence is ambiguous

depth_matched_gate.score_interpretation: uncalibrated g=2..16 OOD score; not the frozen full-g=2..199 gate and not a posterior

orbit_composition_mean_variance.score_interpretation: uncalibrated OOD score; not a posterior probability

raw_all.score_interpretation: uncalibrated OOD score; not a posterior probability

raw_mean_variance.score_interpretation: uncalibrated OOD score; not a posterior probability

frequency_geometry.description: equal-locus aligned-frequency projection of P2-P1 onto P3-P1 and f3(P2;P1,P3); descriptive same-marker geometry, not an independent direction method

records.ground_truth_guardrail: management history motivates P3->P2 with panel-specific strength only conditional on detectable ancestry; the published comparator reuses these loci and exclusive topology is unknown

population_semantics.P3: balanced hatchery-strain proxy

published_comparator.label_source: STRUCTURE assignments from the same 12 loci

provenance.direct_stocking_locator: Table 1 footnotes 1/2 plus Discussion statement that all sites with more than 10% assigned introgression were not directly stocked
provenance.locator: White et al. (2018), Evolutionary Applications 11:1567-1581, Table 1
provenance.source_internal_conflict: DOUB has Table 1 footnotes 1 and 2 (stocking at sample location and within 2 km), but the Discussion categorically says all >10% assigned-introgression sites were not directly stocked
provenance.table_fields: site N, mean p(wild), wild/introgressed/hatchery assignment counts

records.reference_contract: first 22 workbook rows from each of eight sites with zero published non-wild assignments in the same-locus STRUCTURE analysis
records.selection_guardrail: targets were preselected for high same-marker assigned introgression; workbook-order deterministic sensitivity is not the authors' unreleased random wild/hatchery centroid subset

correlated_sensitivity_panels.geographic_guardrail: zero recorded stocking; within-main-branch unreported-source sensitivity
east-branch correlated view of the same broader Saint Mary's biological system

nova_scotia.raw_source_name_collision_guardrail: raw P3 code FM is the n=49 domestic-strain section; Introgression_FM is the paper's centered five-group Fraser's Mills source

padze.allele_contract: all numeric microsatellite alleles retained; no biallelic recoding

direction_evidence.CONK: not directly stocked and no stocking record for more than 50 years; the paper discusses legacy or unrecorded private stocking, so P3->P2 is a same-marker candidate only
direction_evidence.DOUB: source-internal conflict: Table 1 marks stocking at the sample location and within 2 km, but the Discussion says every site with more than 10% assigned introgression was not directly stocked; P3->P2 direction evidence is ambiguous
direction_evidence.LICK: Table 1 marks stocking within 2 km but not at the sample location, consistent with the Discussion's not-directly-stocked statement; P3->P2 is a landscape-scale candidate only

published_comparator_provenance.direct_stocking_locator: Table 1 footnotes 1/2 plus Discussion statement that all sites with more than 10% assigned introgression were not directly stocked
published_comparator_provenance.locator: White et al. (2018), Evolutionary Applications 11:1567-1581, Table 1
published_comparator_provenance.source_internal_conflict: DOUB has Table 1 footnotes 1 and 2 (stocking at sample location and within 2 km), but the Discussion categorically says all >10% assigned-introgression sites were not directly stocked
published_comparator_provenance.table_fields: site N, mean p(wild), wild/introgressed/hatchery assignment counts

initial_compute_gate.known_category_error: trading availability is inactive while direct local/Azure pressure telemetry remains below pinned safety thresholds

pressure_thresholds.basis: one half of the canonical CPU PSI distress threshold and one third of the memory threshold; one nice>=10 process is the minimum throttle mode

pennsylvania.identity_contract: immutable worksheet row ordinal plus site plus raw ID
pennsylvania.paper_cohort_guardrail: raw workbook has 1748 wild rows; paper final 1742 cannot be reconstructed because the six FLAG/POLE exclusions are not identified
pennsylvania.paper_source_mismatch: paper methods name SfoC-79; deposited workbook contains C115 and no C79

pre_analysis_compute_gate.known_category_error: trading availability is inactive while direct local/Azure pressure telemetry remains below pinned safety thresholds

pressure_thresholds.basis: one half of the canonical CPU PSI distress threshold and one third of the memory threshold; one nice>=10 process is the minimum throttle mode

loci.guardrail: 11 is descriptive panel accounting, not independent validation systems or an accuracy denominator; reference, no-record, and locus-filter sensitivities are correlated

ns_saint_marys.guardrail: intersection with the recorded-stocking primary list; did not select it

ns_saint_marys_east.guardrail: intersection with the recorded-stocking primary list; did not select it

ns_st_marys_bay.guardrail: intersection with the recorded-stocking primary list; did not select it

nova_scotia.source_proxy_guardrail: raw Genepop FM is only the n=49 domestic strain even though Introgression_FM names the paper's centered five-group Fraser's Mills source; MR is also raw. These name-colliding proxies are not exact reproductions of either centered source

hatchery_pool.selection: first 50 source-order rows per strain; BELL is the only subsampled strain

pennsylvania.topology_guardrail: the eight-site P1 pool is structured and not one population; LEVL avoids pooling but is not established as the targets' sister/reference population
